executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
CRITICAL CONTEXT FOR TEST GENERATION:
- This app uses Clerk for authentication. There is NO /login route. Auth is handled by Clerk's built-in UI (modal/redirect triggers when accessing any protected route).
- There is NO /pricing route. Pricing is a section on the landing page (scroll to #pricing).
- There is NO /dashboard route. After login, users land on /create.
- Protected routes require Clerk sign-in: /create, /create/text, /create/image, /create/video, /connections, /scheduled, /posted, /studio, /userProfile
- Public routes: / (landing), /PrivacyPolicy (capital P), /tos
- The test account has an active Stripe subscription, 3 connected Pinterest accounts, 3 scheduled posts, and 2+ posted items. No LinkedIn accounts connected.
- TC048: The dark mode toggle (ModeToggle component) uses next-themes with a sun/moon icon button. On marketing pages (/ , /PrivacyPolicy, /tos), the theme is forced to light via forcedTheme prop. The toggle may or may not be visible on the landing page.
- TC049: The RateLimitError component shows 'Rate Limit Exceeded' alert with a countdown timer in MM:SS format and a 'Wait' button. Rate limit for /posted (getContentHistory) is 60 requests per 60 seconds. Triggering it requires many rapid requests.
- TC050: The SubscriptionPrompt shows 'No active subscription' card. The test account HAS an active subscription, so the paywall should NOT appear - verify the gated pages load normally.
- TC051: Image upload limit is 8MB. Validation happens client-side in SocialPostForm checksBeforeSubmission(). Error message: 'Image size exceeds the maximum limit of XMB.'
